zh.Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Chamberlain於1392年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯時，他的父親Richard III Chamberlain36歲，母親Margaret de Loveyne21歲。他於1428年與Margaret Knyvet在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1439年3月17日之前在英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯。

zh-hans.Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England: 英国貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Chamberlain于1392年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯时，他的父亲Richard III Chamberlain36岁，母亲Margaret de Loveyne21岁。他于1428年与Margaret Knyvet在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1439年3月17日之前在英国貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

variants.name: Chamberlin
meanings: French: occupational name for an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, from Old French chamberlenc ‘chamberlain’. See also Chamberlain and compare above.

variants.name: Chambers
meanings: from Middle English chaumbre ‘room (in a house); reception room in a palace or official building’ (Old French chambre). It is identical in implied function with the Chamberlain , which denoted an official: to pay in cameram was to pay into the exchequer, of which the camerarius or chamberer was in charge. The surname also applied to clerks employed there. As the office of Chamberlain rose in the social scale, this term remained reserved for more humble servants of the bedchamber or private quarters.
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Les Chambres, Manche (France).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Chamberlain was born in 1392, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard III Chamberlain, was 36 and his mother, Margaret de Loveyne, was 21. He married Margaret Knyvet in 1428, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 17 March 1439, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Chamberlain est né en 1392, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard III Chamberlain, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Loveyne, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Knyvet en 1428, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 17 mars 1439, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Chamberlain 1392 in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard III Chamberlain 36 und seine Mutter Margaret de Loveyne 21. Er hat 1428 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Knyvet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 17. März 1439 in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Chamberlain è nato il nel 1392 nel Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard III Chamberlain, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Loveyne, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Knyvet nel 1428, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 17 marzo 1439, nel Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England: イギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルス
ja.Shirburn, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイルブルン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Chamberlainが1392年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスで生まれた時，父Richard III Chamberlainは36歳，母Margaret de Loveyneは21歳であった。1428年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Knyvetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1439年3月17日以前にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Chamberlain(이)가 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard III Chamberlain(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Loveyne(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1428년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Knyvet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1439년 3월 17일 이전 영국 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Chamberlain nasceu em 1392, em Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard III Chamberlain, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Loveyne, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Knyvet em 1428, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 17 de março de 1439, em Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Chamberlain родился в 1392 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard III Chamberlain было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Loveyne, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Knyvet в 1428 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 17 марта 1439 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Chamberlain nació en 1392, en Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard III Chamberlain, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret de Loveyne, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Knyvet en 1428, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 17 de marzo de 1439, en Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
